# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent kafka topic authorization.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties file configuration 
listeners: PLAINTEXT://localhost:9092 (default)
log.dirs:/path/to/your/directory(es)/kafka-logs   # Log directory path for Kafka broker logs, multiple directories can be separated by commas or newlines if needed 
num.replicas:1                          # Number of replicas per topic to maintain in the cluster (default is one)   
zookeeper.connect:/hostname/or/IPaddress(es):port   # Zookeeper connection string, multiple hosts can be separated by commas or newlines if needed 
broker.id:1                             # Unique broker id for this Kafka instance (default is zero)   
log.retention.minutes=60               # Log retention time in minutes(es), default value depends on log retention policy, can be set to a specific number if needed 
message.max.bytes:1284                 # Maximum bytes per message (default is unlimited)   
log.retention.time_in_ms=60*60*24     # Log deletion time in milliseconds(es), default value depends on log retention policy, can be set to a specific number if needed
